testimonials.name: Jamila T.
testimonials.quote: I switched Buddy to Dolphin mode during a rebrand and it gave me 30 campaign concepts in an afternoon that I would never have thought of myself. I've tried every AI tool — none of them think like this.

testimonials.name: Marcus R.
testimonials.quote: The Beaver archetype is genuinely uncanny. I described the app I was building and it produced a complete system architecture diagram — with failure modes — in 10 minutes. My team reviewed it for 3 days and couldn't find anything wrong.

testimonials.name: Dr. Aisha K.
testimonials.quote: I've been using the Elephant archetype for a 6-month research project. Buddy remembers every paper I've referenced, every hypothesis I've discarded, and every dead end I've hit. It's like having a research partner with perfect recall.

testimonials.name: Deon W.
testimonials.quote: The Owl is my thinking partner. When I'm stuck on a strategic decision, I switch to Owl mode and work through it from first principles. The quality of reasoning is genuinely different — it slows down and thinks in a way most AI just doesn't.
